# Mikołaj Piech

> Founder & developer who builds and ships consumer apps on iOS, Android, and web.

Founder and developer from Poland who builds and ships consumer software. Creator of Trailo (AI travel planning), Subby (subscription management), Doso (personal health), and Solvee (AI homework helper, acquired).

## Docs
- [Full site summary (https://mikolajpiech.com/llms-full.txt)](https://mikolajpiech.com/llms-full.txt): Plain-text bio, projects, timeline, FAQs — best source for AI agents
- [Structured data (https://mikolajpiech.com/schema.json)](https://mikolajpiech.com/schema.json): JSON-LD with Person, WebSite, projects, and FAQs

## Pages
- [Home](https://mikolajpiech.com/): About, projects overview, timeline, contact
- [Portfolio (interactive)](https://mikolajpiech.com/portfolio): Detailed shipped apps in the main site
- [Portfolio (plain HTML for agents)](https://mikolajpiech.com/crawl/portfolio.html): Crawlable project details without JavaScript
- [Privacy Policy](https://mikolajpiech.com/privacy-policy): Data handling for this website and published apps
